\tzpentry{ID3431}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3431 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$G(r, \theta, \phi) = g(\theta, \phi) \left(\frac{r}{R}\right)^\beta \cos(\ln \frac{r}{R} + \phi_0)$$
